title: Tamil Nadu’s Fiscal Reality Before the Poll Promises Begin
description: Before the promise race begins in Tamil Nadu’s 2026 elections, the state’s growing debt and shrinking fiscal space deserve closer scrutiny. As Tamil Nadu heads toward Assembly elections in April–May this year (2026), the political atmosphere is already warming up, […] The post Tamil Nadu’s Fiscal Reality Before the Poll Promises Begin appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
